items.statcast_observation: Isaac Collins produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 110.4 mph at a -15.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Chicago White Sox, KC 5, CWS 4. Carter Jensen led the night, 3-5 | 2B, K, 2 RBI in the latest Royals game. Isaac Collins supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.4 mph.
items.title: Royals at White Sox Recap
